example_sentence: Choosing sustainable products is increasingly becoming a lifestyle choice for environmentally conscious consumers worldwide.

definition_vi: biểu tượng thời trang, người nổi tiếng về phong cách
definition_en: a famous person admired for their style and influence on fashion
example_sentence: Audrey Hepburn remains a fashion icon whose elegant and timeless style continues to influence designers and fashion enthusiasts globally.

definition_vi: kết hợp các item khác nhau với nhau
definition_en: to combine different items in various ways to create different outfits
example_sentence: The versatile pieces in her wardrobe allowed her to mix and match outfits easily for different occasions throughout the week.

definition_vi: mặc quần áo đẹp, trang điểm để đi đâu đó
definition_en: to wear special or formal clothes for an occasion
example_sentence: She decided to dress up in her finest evening gown and jewelry for the prestigious charity gala held at the downtown convention center.

definition_vi: trang phục bình thường, quần áo thoải mái
definition_en: comfortable clothes worn for everyday activities rather than formal occasions
example_sentence: Most people prefer casual wear like jeans and t-shirts for weekend outings with family and friends in relaxed settings.

definition_vi: cách thể hiện cá nhân qua thời trang, câu nói thông qua thời trang
definition_en: a distinctive way of dressing that expresses one's personality or views
example_sentence: Her bold color choices and unique accessories made a clear fashion statement about her confidence and artistic personality.

definition_vi: phong cách kết hợp quần áo thể thao với trang phục hàng ngày
definition_en: a style of clothing that blends athletic and leisurewear for everyday comfort
example_sentence: The athleisure trend has revolutionized modern fashion by making comfortable sportswear acceptable for social gatherings and casual workplaces.

definition_vi: thêm phụ kiện để hoàn thiện trang phục
definition_en: to add accessories to an outfit to enhance or complete it
example_sentence: She learned to accessorize her simple black dress with different scarves and jewelry to create multiple distinct looks.

definition_vi: thương hiệu cao cấp, hàng hiệu sang trọng
definition_en: a prestigious company that produces expensive, high-quality products
example_sentence: The luxury brand expanded its product line to include lifestyle accessories while maintaining its reputation for exceptional quality.

definition_vi: chuyên gia tư vấn thời trang, người bổ sung kiến thức về phong cách
definition_en: a professional who helps people improve their personal style and fashion choices
example_sentence: The style consultant recommended neutral colors and classic cuts that would create a more professional image for her corporate position.

definition_vi: chăm sóc bản thân, vệ sinh cá nhân, làm đẹp
definition_en: the practice of keeping oneself clean and well-presented through hygiene and care
example_sentence: Good personal grooming habits are essential in professional environments where appearance significantly impacts workplace credibility and relationships.

definition_vi: buổi trình diễn thời trang, catwalk
definition_en: a fashion show where models display new clothing designs on a catwalk
example_sentence: The international runway show in Milan showcased innovative designs from emerging designers alongside established fashion houses.

definition_vi: bộ quần áo, tổng thể trang phục
definition_en: a set of clothes worn together as a complete set
example_sentence: She carefully selected an outfit that combined comfortable jeans with an elegant blouse suitable for both work and evening activities.

definition_vi: liên quan đến nghề may mặc hoặc cách ăn mặc; thường dùng để chỉ phong cách thời trang tinh tế, có kiến thức sâu về quần áo
definition_en: relating to tailoring, clothes, or the art of dressing well with refined taste
example_sentence: Her sartorial choices reflect a deep understanding of color theory and fabric composition.

definition_vi: một bộ quần áo hoặc một mảnh vải được may thành quần áo; thuật ngữ chính thức trong ngành thời trang
definition_en: a piece of clothing; a formal term for any item of apparel
example_sentence: The designer carefully selected premium fabrics for each garment in the collection.

definition_vi: hình dáng hoặc đường nét tổng thể của một bộ quần áo; cách một trang phục tạo hình dáng cho cơ thể
definition_en: the outline or general shape of a garment or how clothing fits the body
example_sentence: The A-line silhouette of the dress flatters various body types and remains timeless.

definition_vi: thành phần vật liệu của một loại vải; tỷ lệ các sợi (cotton, polyester, silk, v.v.) tạo nên vải
definition_en: the blend of fibers and materials that make up a textile
example_sentence: The fabric composition of 60% cotton and 40% polyester ensures durability and comfort.

definition_vi: cách vải rơi hoặc xếp nếp tự nhiên trên cơ thể; hoặc làm cho vải rơi một cách thanh lịch
definition_en: the way fabric falls and folds on the body; to arrange fabric elegantly
example_sentence: The silk fabric's natural drape creates an elegant, flowing effect that enhances movement.

definition_vi: bộ sưu tập các màu sắc được sử dụng trong một bộ sưu tập thời trang hoặc trang phục
definition_en: a range of colors used in a fashion collection or outfit
example_sentence: The designer's autumn palette features rich jewel tones and earthy neutrals.

definition_vi: chi tiết trang trí được thêm vào quần áo như hạt, ren, thêu, v.v.
definition_en: decorative details added to garments such as beads, lace, embroidery, or sequins
example_sentence: The gown's intricate embellishments of hand-sewn crystals elevate its luxury appeal.

definition_vi: được làm riêng theo yêu cầu của khách hàng; thường dùng cho quần áo cao cấp được may đo
definition_en: custom-made according to individual specifications; tailored to personal requirements
example_sentence: Bespoke tailoring allows clients to select fabrics, cuts, and finishes that match their preferences.

definition_vi: nguyên tắc hoặc tiêu chuẩn về vẻ đẹp; phong cách hoặc hình ảnh tổng thể mà ai đó theo đuổi
definition_en: a set of principles about beauty and style; the overall visual appearance someone cultivates
example_sentence: Her minimalist aesthetic emphasizes clean lines, neutral colors, and functional design.

definition_vi: mối quan hệ giữa các phần khác nhau của một bộ trang phục; cách các yếu tố được cân bằng với nhau
definition_en: the relationship between different parts of an outfit; how elements are balanced
example_sentence: Good proportion in fashion means balancing a voluminous top with fitted bottoms.

definition_vi: một bộ quần áo có thể kết hợp với nhiều trang phục khác nhau; đa năng và linh hoạt
definition_en: a garment that can be styled in multiple ways and paired with various outfits
example_sentence: A white button-down shirt is a versatile piece that works for both casual and formal occasions.

definition_vi: hồi phục, vượt qua (bệnh tật, khó khăn)
definition_en: to recover from an illness or a difficult experience
example_sentence: It took her a few weeks to get over the flu.

definition_vi: ngất xỉu
definition_en: to become unconscious
example_sentence: He passed out from the heat and dehydration.

definition_vi: nôn mửa
definition_en: to vomit
example_sentence: She felt sick and had to throw up.

definition_vi: bị mắc (bệnh)
definition_en: to start to suffer from an illness
example_sentence: I think I'm coming down with a cold.

definition_vi: cắt giảm (thứ gì đó không tốt cho sức khỏe)
definition_en: to reduce the amount of something you do or consume
example_sentence: You should cut down on sugar and fatty foods.

definition_vi: tăng cân
definition_en: to become heavier
example_sentence: He's put on weight since he stopped exercising.

definition_vi: giảm cân
definition_en: to become lighter
example_sentence: She is trying to lose weight by eating a healthy diet.

definition_vi: giống (ai đó về ngoại hình hoặc tính cách)
definition_en: to resemble a parent or older relative
example_sentence: He takes after his father in many ways.

definition_vi: chăm sóc, trông nom
definition_en: to take care of someone or something
example_sentence: Can you look after my cat while I'm on holiday?

definition_vi: kiểm tra sức khỏe định kỳ, theo dõi tình hình
definition_en: to examine someone or something to make sure they are well or safe
example_sentence: The doctor will check up on your progress next week.

definition_vi: giảm sút (sức khỏe, cân nặng)
definition_en: to decrease or become less
example_sentence: His energy levels have fallen off recently.

definition_vi: tăng cường, xây dựng (sức khỏe, cơ bắp)
definition_en: to increase or develop over a period of time
example_sentence: Regular exercise helps to build up your immune system.

definition_vi: hết tác dụng, giảm dần (thuốc, cảm giác)
definition_en: to disappear gradually
example_sentence: The effects of the painkillers will wear off soon.

definition_vi: bắt đầu một thói quen, sở thích mới
definition_en: to start a new activity or hobby
example_sentence: She decided to take up yoga for her health.

definition_vi: loại bỏ, ngừng ăn/uống (thứ gì đó không tốt)
definition_en: to stop eating or drinking something
example_sentence: He's cut out all processed foods from his diet.

definition_vi: bị mắc (bệnh truyền nhiễm)
definition_en: to become ill with a particular illness
example_sentence: Many children went down with chickenpox at school.

definition_vi: thoát tội, không bị trừng phạt (thường dùng trong ngữ cảnh tiêu cực, nhưng có thể áp dụng cho việc 'thoát khỏi' bệnh tật nhẹ)
definition_en: to not be caught or punished for doing something wrong
example_sentence: He thought he could get away with eating junk food every day, but his health suffered.

definition_vi: hoãn lại; làm ai đó mất hứng thú
definition_en: to postpone; to make someone dislike something or someone
example_sentence: The bad smell put me off my food.

definition_vi: cất cánh (máy bay); cởi (quần áo); nghỉ phép
definition_en: to leave the ground (plane); to remove (clothing); to stop working for a period of time
example_sentence: He had to take time off work to recover from his surgery.

definition_vi: tỉnh lại (sau khi ngất)
definition_en: to regain consciousness
example_sentence: After a few minutes, she started to come round.

definition_vi: vượt qua (khó khăn, bệnh tật)
definition_en: to survive a difficult period or experience
example_sentence: It was a tough time, but we managed to get through it.

definition_vi: kiệt sức, suy nhược
definition_en: to become weak or tired
example_sentence: He's been working too hard and is starting to run down.

definition_vi: tiêu hóa; tiếp thu (kiến thức)
definition_en: to digest; to understand or absorb information
example_sentence: It's hard to take in so much information at once.

definition_vi: thành công, có kết quả tốt (thường đi với 'well' hoặc 'badly')
definition_en: to be successful or unsuccessful
example_sentence: The diet plan didn't come off as well as she had hoped.

definition_vi: thất bại, không thành hiện thực (kế hoạch, thỏa thuận)
definition_en: to fail to happen or be completed
example_sentence: Their plans for a healthy lifestyle fell through due to lack of commitment.

definition_vi: xoay sở để sống, đối phó (thường với ít tiền hoặc khó khăn)
definition_en: to manage to live or do something with difficulty
example_sentence: It's hard to get by on a low income, especially with rising healthcare costs.

definition_vi: cải thiện (tình hình, sức khỏe)
definition_en: to improve
example_sentence: His health is starting to look up after the treatment.

definition_vi: bù đắp (thời gian ngủ, công sức)
definition_en: to compensate for something
example_sentence: She needs to make up for lost sleep due to her busy schedule.

definition_vi: tiếp quản, đảm nhận
definition_en: to assume control of something
example_sentence: The new management is trying to take over the company's health initiatives.

definition_vi: tập thể dục; giải quyết (vấn đề)
definition_en: to exercise; to solve a problem
example_sentence: He works out at the gym three times a week to stay fit.

definition_vi: hoạt động không bình thường, trục trặc (cơ thể, máy móc)
definition_en: to behave badly or not work correctly
example_sentence: My knee has been acting up lately, so I need to see a doctor.

definition_vi: hỏng hóc (máy móc); suy sụp tinh thần
definition_en: to stop functioning (machine); to become emotionally upset
example_sentence: He broke down after hearing the bad news about his health.

definition_vi: khỏi bệnh, khỏi (vết thương); làm sáng tỏ
definition_en: to become healthy again; to solve a mystery or problem
example_sentence: The doctor expects his condition to clear up in a few days.

definition_vi: sống thiếu, làm mà không có
definition_en: to manage to live or function without something or someone
example_sentence: It's difficult to do without proper medical care in remote areas.

definition_vi: hồi phục, vượt qua (bệnh tật, cảm xúc tiêu cực)
definition_en: to recover from an illness or an unpleasant experience
example_sentence: She's finding it hard to get over the shock of the diagnosis.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Trở nên tồi tệ hơn, suy giảm chất lượng
definition_en: To become gradually worse in quality or condition
example_sentence: The patient's health condition began to deteriorate after he stopped taking medication regularly for his chronic disease.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Không rõ ràng, mơ hồ, khó hiểu
definition_en: Not clearly expressed or easily understood; unclear or vague
example_sentence: The author's obscure writing style made it difficult for readers to comprehend the central theme throughout the entire philosophical novel.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Cẩn thận, tỉ mỉ, chính xác từng chi tiết
definition_en: Showing great attention to detail; very careful and precise
example_sentence: The architect's meticulous attention to every structural detail ensured the building would withstand earthquakes and other potential environmental disasters.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Tạm thời, ngắn hạn, chóng qua
definition_en: Temporary; lasting only for a short time
example_sentence: Although the economic growth appeared impressive, economists warned that it was merely a transient phenomenon caused by temporary market conditions.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Thực tế, hướng tới kết quả thực tiễn
definition_en: Dealing with things in a practical, realistic way based on actual circumstances
example_sentence: The government adopted a pragmatic approach to environmental policy by balancing industrial development with necessary conservation measures.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Thẳng thắn, chân thành, không giấu diếm
definition_en: Frank, honest, and straightforward; not hiding one's thoughts or feelings
example_sentence: In her candid interview, the renowned scientist discussed both her groundbreaking achievements and the personal sacrifices she made throughout her remarkable career.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Đàn áp, ngăn chặn, che giấu
definition_en: To prevent something from being revealed, expressed, or continued; to forcibly put an end to something
example_sentence: Authoritarian governments often attempt to suppress free speech and media coverage of political opposition movements and civil rights demonstrations.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Lành tính, không nguy hiểm, tốt bụng
definition_en: Not harmful or threatening; gentle and kind-hearted
example_sentence: Although the tumor was benign and posed no serious health threat, doctors still recommended regular monitoring and frequent medical examinations.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Ngắn gọn, súc tích, vắn tắt
definition_en: Brief and clearly expressed in few words; concise
example_sentence: The executive's succinct presentation effectively communicated the company's strategic objectives to all stakeholders in just fifteen minutes.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Tự mãn, không quan tâm, chủ quan
definition_en: Satisfied with oneself; lacking awareness of potential dangers or problems
example_sentence: The complacent management team failed to anticipate market changes, resulting in significant losses when competitors introduced innovative products.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Tất cả những gì ai đó nói là đúng hoặc hợp lý
definition_en: To clear someone from blame or suspicion; to prove or justify something
example_sentence: Recent scientific research has vindicated the environmentalist's decades-old warnings about catastrophic effects of unchecked carbon emissions on global climate patterns.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Vòng quanh, tránh, phá vỡ (quy luật)
definition_en: To find a way around an obstacle; to avoid or bypass a rule or law
example_sentence: The corporation attempted to circumvent environmental regulations by establishing subsidiary companies in countries with less stringent pollution control standards.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Sắc sảo, có tinh mắt, thông minh
definition_en: Having keen insight and understanding; demonstrating sharp judgment and discernment
example_sentence: The perspicacious analyst's detailed examination of financial records revealed hidden accounting irregularities that auditors had previously overlooked.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Chóng vánh, tạm thời, chỉ tồn tại trong thời gian ngắn
definition_en: Lasting for a very short time; transitory
example_sentence: Social media influencers often experience ephemeral fame that disappears quickly once public interest shifts to newer content and emerging personalities.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Gây tranh cãi, gay gắt, hay tranh luận
definition_en: Causing or likely to cause argument or controversy; involving heated debate
example_sentence: The contentious policy proposal sparked heated debates among policymakers who held fundamentally different views on immigration and national security issues.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Cải thiện, làm tốt hơn, giảm nhẹ
definition_en: To make something better or improve a situation; to ease or alleviate suffering
example_sentence: Government programs designed to ameliorate poverty through education and vocational training have significantly improved socioeconomic outcomes for disadvantaged communities.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Làm tối tăm, làm rối, làm khó hiểu
definition_en: To deliberately make something unclear or difficult to understand; to obscure the truth
example_sentence: Corporate executives were accused of deliberately obfuscating financial information to mislead investors about the company's actual profitability and asset values.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Thuận lợi, tốt lành, hứa hẹn
definition_en: Giving or indicating a good chance of success; favorable
example_sentence: The propitious combination of economic growth, technological innovation, and political stability created an ideal environment for sustained entrepreneurial development.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Sâu sắc, thuyết phục, chặt chẽ (lập luận)
definition_en: Clear, logical, and convincing; compelling in argument or reasoning
example_sentence: The researcher's cogent argument, supported by extensive empirical evidence and rigorous statistical analysis, fundamentally changed academic perspectives on climate science.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: Có thể hiểu nhiều cách, mơ hồ, không rõ ràng
definition_en: Open to more than one interpretation; ambiguous; uncertain or non-committal
example_sentence: The politician's equivocal response to journalists' questions about corruption allegations left observers uncertain about the government's actual position on accountability matters.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: làm tình huống trở nên tồi tệ hơn, làm trầm trọng thêm
definition_en: to make a problem or bad situation worse
example_sentence: The lack of investment in infrastructure has exacerbated regional inequality and deepened social tensions.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: giảm nhẹ, làm giảm bớt mức độ nghiêm trọng của điều gì
definition_en: to make something less severe or serious
example_sentence: Governments must implement policies to mitigate the effects of climate change on vulnerable populations.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: tăng cường, làm mạnh hơn, hỗ trợ hoặc củng cố
definition_en: to strengthen or support something; to make it more confident or effective
example_sentence: The government's investment in education aims to bolster economic competitiveness and innovation.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: làm suy yếu, phá hoại từ từ, làm mất đi sự tin tưởng hoặc uy tín
definition_en: to weaken or damage something gradually, especially someone's confidence or authority
example_sentence: Misinformation campaigns undermine public trust in democratic institutions and scientific expertise.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: cung cấp bằng chứng hoặc chứng minh rằng điều gì là đúng
definition_en: to provide evidence or proof that something is true
example_sentence: The researcher must substantiate her claims with empirical data and peer-reviewed studies.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: bác bỏ, chứng minh rằng điều gì là sai hoặc không đúng
definition_en: to prove that something is false or incorrect
example_sentence: The new evidence refutes the long-standing theory about the origins of the disease.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: tăng nhanh về số lượng, nhân rộng, lan rộng
definition_en: to increase rapidly in number; to spread or multiply
example_sentence: Social media platforms have proliferated, creating unprecedented opportunities for both communication and misinformation.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: cắt giảm, hạn chế, làm ngắn lại hoặc giới hạn
definition_en: to reduce or limit something; to cut short
example_sentence: The government's decision to curtail public spending has raised concerns about the quality of essential services.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: tách ra, đi theo hướng khác nhau, có ý kiến khác nhau
definition_en: to separate and go in different directions; to differ in opinion or approach
example_sentence: The two countries' economic policies have diverged significantly, reflecting their different priorities and values.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: hội tụ, gặp nhau, tiến tới cùng một điểm hoặc kết luận
definition_en: to come together or meet at a point; to reach agreement or similarity
example_sentence: International experts converge on the conclusion that immediate action is necessary to address climate change.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: gây ra hoặc kích hoạt (một sự kiện), làm xảy ra đột ngột
definition_en: to cause something to happen suddenly or unexpectedly
example_sentence: The assassination of the archduke precipitated a chain of events that led to World War I.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: buộc tội, cáo buộc, cung cấp bằng chứng cho thấy ai đó có tội
definition_en: to show or suggest that someone is guilty of a crime or wrongdoing
example_sentence: The witness's testimony incriminated several high-ranking officials in the corruption scandal.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: xác nhận, chứng thực, cung cấp bằng chứng bổ sung cho điều gì
definition_en: to confirm or support a statement or finding with additional evidence
example_sentence: Multiple independent studies corroborate the findings of the original research on vaccine efficacy.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: làm yếu đi, làm mỏng đi, giảm bớt sức mạnh hoặc tác động
definition_en: to make something weaker or less intense; to reduce in force or effect
example_sentence: The protective measures attenuate the severity of the disease but do not eliminate it entirely.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: tăng cường, phóng đại, làm to lên hoặc mạnh hơn
definition_en: to increase the strength or effect of something; to make louder or more noticeable
example_sentence: Social media algorithms amplify sensational content, which can distort public perception of reality.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: làm sáng tỏ, giải thích rõ ràng, làm cho dễ hiểu
definition_en: to explain or clarify something in a clear and detailed way
example_sentence: The professor's lecture elucidated the complex philosophical concepts with compelling examples.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: đặt cạnh nhau để so sánh hoặc tạo ra hiệu ứng tương phản
definition_en: to place two things side by side, especially for comparison or contrast
example_sentence: The artist juxtaposes images of nature and industrial development to critique environmental destruction.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: củng cố, làm chắc chắn; gộp lại thành một khối; tập trung quyền lực/tài sản
definition_en: to strengthen or make more secure; to combine into one
example_sentence: The government consolidated its power by merging several agencies into a single ministry.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: làm mòn, làm hủy hoại dần dần; suy yếu từng chút một (niềm tin, quyền lực)
definition_en: to gradually wear away or weaken; to destroy slowly
example_sentence: Constant criticism eroded public confidence in the institution over several years.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: phát triển nhanh chóng, nảy nở; tăng trưởng mạnh mẽ
definition_en: growing, flourishing, or expanding rapidly
example_sentence: The burgeoning tech industry in Southeast Asia has attracted billions in foreign investment.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: trì trệ, không phát triển; đình trệ; (nước) không chảy, ứ đọng
definition_en: showing no growth, development, or improvement; motionless
example_sentence: The stagnant economy forced policymakers to implement aggressive stimulus measures.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: có tính trả thù, báo thù; mang tính trừng phạt hơn là công bằng
definition_en: seeking to harm someone in return for perceived injury; vengeful
example_sentence: The court ruled that the punitive damages were vindictive rather than compensatory.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: cao thượng, hào phóng; rộng lượng, không tính toán nhỏ nhen
definition_en: generous and forgiving; noble in spirit
example_sentence: Despite his rival's harsh attacks, the leader remained magnanimous and offered reconciliation.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: nhiệt tình, sôi nổi; đam mê sâu sắc; (cảm xúc) mãnh liệt
definition_en: intensely enthusiastic or passionate; ardent
example_sentence: The fervid supporters of the movement organized rallies across the nation.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: thờ ơ, vô cảm; không quan tâm, thiếu hứng thú
definition_en: lacking interest, enthusiasm, or concern; indifferent
example_sentence: The apathetic response from voters suggested declining trust in political institutions.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: sắc sảo, nhạy bén; có tính thấu đáo, sâu sắc; (phê bình) chỉ trích sắc bén
definition_en: intelligently analytical and clear-thinking; sharp and penetrating
example_sentence: The journalist's incisive analysis of the scandal exposed systemic corruption.

set_name: Đồng nghĩa & Trái nghĩa theo ngữ cảnh
definition_vi: bề ngoài, hời hợt; không sâu sắc, không đi vào bản chất; chỉ ở mặt ngoài
definition_en: existing or occurring on the surface; lacking depth or substance
example_sentence: The report provided only a superficial examination of the underlying causes.

definition_vi: tình trạng sức khỏe tâm thần, bao gồm cảm xúc, tâm lý và nhận thức xã hội
definition_en: a person's condition with regard to their psychological and emotional well-being
example_sentence: Many adolescents struggle with mental health issues due to academic pressure and social media influence.

definition_vi: rối loạn lo âu, một bệnh tâm thần đặc trưng bởi lo lắng kéo dài và sợ hãi quá mức
definition_en: a mental health condition characterized by persistent worry and excessive fear
example_sentence: Students with anxiety disorders often experience panic attacks before important examinations.

definition_vi: tình trạng buồn bã kéo dài, mất hứng thú, mất năng lượng
definition_en: a mental health disorder marked by persistent sadness and loss of interest in daily activities
example_sentence: Clinical depression requires professional treatment and should not be confused with temporary sadness.

definition_vi: các kỹ thuật kiểm soát và giảm căng thẳng
definition_en: techniques and strategies used to control and reduce levels of stress
example_sentence: Effective stress management techniques include meditation, exercise, and maintaining healthy sleep patterns.

definition_vi: tình trạng kiệt sức, mệt mỏi toàn thân do làm việc quá sức
definition_en: physical and emotional exhaustion caused by prolonged stress
example_sentence: Teacher burnout has become a significant concern in education systems worldwide.

definition_vi: sự chú ý toàn bộ, nhận thức tỉnh táo về hiện tại
definition_en: the practice of maintaining full awareness and attention to the present moment
example_sentence: Mindfulness meditation is increasingly incorporated into school curricula to enhance student well-being.

definition_vi: khả năng phục hồi tâm thần, khả năng vượt qua khó khăn
definition_en: the ability to recover quickly from difficulties and adapt to challenging situations
example_sentence: Building mental resilience in young people requires consistent emotional support and coping skill development.

definition_vi: can thiệp trị liệu, biện pháp điều trị tâm lý
definition_en: professional treatment designed to improve mental health and psychological functioning
example_sentence: Cognitive-behavioral therapy is one of the most effective therapeutic interventions for anxiety disorders.

definition_vi: đối phó, xử lý, vượt qua
definition_en: to deal with something difficult or challenging successfully
example_sentence: Adolescents learn various strategies to cope with the emotional challenges of teenage development.

definition_vi: chia sẻ cảm xúc, bộc lộ suy nghĩ, nói lên điều tâm sự
definition_en: to share one's feelings or thoughts honestly with another person
example_sentence: Students should feel comfortable opening up to counselors about their mental health concerns.

definition_vi: sụp đổ, chảy nước mắt, có cơn hoảng loạn
definition_en: to lose emotional control or experience an emotional crisis
example_sentence: When students break down under examination stress, school counselors provide immediate emotional support.

definition_vi: sự kiệt sức về mặt tinh thần
definition_en: severe tiredness and depletion of mental and emotional energy
example_sentence: Chronic mental exhaustion can impair academic performance and social relationships.

definition_vi: sự tự trọng, lòng tin vào bản thân
definition_en: confidence in one's own worth or abilities
example_sentence: Social media often negatively impacts teenagers' self-esteem and body image.

definition_vi: sự cô lập xã hội, tách biệt khỏi cộng đồng
definition_en: the state of being disconnected from social contacts and community
example_sentence: The pandemic exacerbated social isolation among students, leading to increased mental health challenges.

definition_vi: trí tuệ cảm xúc, khả năng nhận thức, hiểu biết và kiểm soát cảm xúc
definition_en: the ability to recognize, understand, and manage emotions in oneself and others
example_sentence: Developing emotional intelligence helps students manage interpersonal conflicts more effectively.

definition_vi: mạng lưới hỗ trợ, những người giúp đỡ khi cần
definition_en: a group of people who provide practical, emotional, or moral support
example_sentence: A strong support network of family and friends is crucial for mental health recovery.

definition_vi: cơ chế ứng phó, cách thức đối phó với khó khăn
definition_en: strategies or behaviors used to manage stress and difficult emotions
example_sentence: Healthy coping mechanisms include exercise, journaling, and talking to trusted individuals.

definition_vi: trạng thái tốt lành về tâm lý, hạnh phúc và sự hài lòng
definition_en: a state of contentment and satisfaction with one's mental and emotional health
example_sentence: Schools increasingly prioritize student psychological well-being through comprehensive mental health programs.

definition_vi: liệu pháp tâm lý, điều trị bằng cách nói chuyện với chuyên gia
definition_en: treatment of mental or emotional disorders through talking with a trained professional
example_sentence: Psychotherapy combined with medication has proven effective for treating severe depression.

definition_vi: yếu tố kích hoạt căng thẳng, nguyên nhân gây stress
definition_en: a situation or event that causes stress or anxiety
example_sentence: Identifying personal stress triggers helps students develop targeted strategies for anxiety management.

definition_vi: cân bằng giữa công việc/học tập và cuộc sống cá nhân
definition_en: the equilibrium between time devoted to work/studies and personal pursuits
example_sentence: Maintaining work-life balance is essential for preventing academic burnout among high school students.

definition_vi: hỗ trợ từ bạn bè cùng tuổi hoặc cùng tình cảnh
definition_en: emotional and practical support provided by people with similar experiences
example_sentence: Peer support groups enable students to share experiences and develop stronger mental resilience.

definition_vi: liệu pháp nhận thức, điều trị bằng cách thay đổi suy nghĩ tiêu cực
definition_en: a treatment approach that focuses on changing negative thought patterns
example_sentence: Cognitive therapy helps patients recognize and challenge irrational beliefs contributing to anxiety.

definition_vi: rối loạn tâm thần, bệnh tâm lý
definition_en: a clinical condition affecting thoughts, emotions, and behavior
example_sentence: Early diagnosis and intervention for mental disorders significantly improve treatment outcomes.

definition_vi: cách tiếp cận toàn diện, xem xét tất cả các khía cạnh
definition_en: a comprehensive approach that considers all aspects of a person's health
example_sentence: A holistic approach to mental health incorporates physical exercise, nutrition, and social relationships.

definition_vi: chăm sóc bản thân, những hành động tự chăm sóc sức khỏe
definition_en: activities undertaken to maintain and improve physical and mental health
example_sentence: Regular self-care practices including adequate sleep and exercise improve overall mental well-being.

definition_vi: sự dễ bị tổn thương, sự yếu đuối
definition_en: the quality of being open to emotional or psychological harm
example_sentence: Understanding emotional vulnerability helps people seek help without shame or stigma.

definition_vi: sự kỳ thị đối với những người bị rối loạn tâm thần
definition_en: negative attitudes and discrimination against people with mental health conditions
example_sentence: Reducing mental health stigma requires public education and increased awareness campaigns.

definition_vi: kỹ thuật neo buộc, phương pháp đưa tâm thần về hiện tại khi hoảng loạn
definition_en: a mindfulness technique used to calm anxiety by connecting to the present moment
example_sentence: The 5-4-3-2-1 grounding technique effectively reduces panic attack symptoms by engaging the senses.

definition_vi: mệt mỏi về mặt tinh thần, sự yếu đuối của suy nghĩ
definition_en: decreased mental capacity and alertness resulting from prolonged cognitive effort
example_sentence: Students experiencing mental fatigue should take regular breaks to maintain concentration during exams.

definition_vi: chương trình nâng cao sức khỏe và phúc lợi
definition_en: organized initiatives designed to promote physical and mental health
example_sentence: Schools implement comprehensive wellness programs combining exercise, counseling, and nutritional education.

definition_vi: Tình trạng khó chịu, đau khổ về tâm lý; sự bất ổn cảm xúc gây ảnh hưởng đến chất lượng cuộc sống
definition_en: Emotional or mental suffering that significantly impacts daily functioning and well-being
example_sentence: Adolescents experiencing psychological distress often exhibit changes in academic performance and social behavior.

definition_vi: Hành vi không thích ứng; cách ứng xử không hiệu quả hoặc có hại trong việc giải quyết vấn đề hoặc căng thẳng
definition_en: Behavioral patterns that fail to address problems effectively and may worsen psychological or social difficulties
example_sentence: Substance abuse is often a maladaptive behavior used to escape from underlying anxiety and trauma.

definition_vi: Khả năng kiểm soát, điều chỉnh cảm xúc của bản thân một cách hiệu quả; quản lý phản ứng cảm xúc
definition_en: The ability to manage and modulate emotional responses in appropriate and healthy ways
example_sentence: Children who develop strong emotional regulation skills are better equipped to handle interpersonal conflicts.

definition_vi: Sự suy nghĩ lặp đi lặp lại, chuyên tâm vào những suy tư tiêu cực hoặc vấn đề mà không tìm được giải pháp
definition_en: Repetitive, unproductive thinking focused on negative thoughts or problems without reaching resolution
example_sentence: Rumination is a significant cognitive pattern associated with prolonged depressive episodes and anxiety disorders.

definition_vi: Xung đột giữa các cá nhân; bất đồng, mâu thuẫn trong mối quan hệ giữa hai hay nhiều người
definition_en: Disagreement or tension arising between individuals in personal or professional relationships
example_sentence: Unresolved interpersonal conflict in the workplace can escalate stress levels and diminish employee mental health.

definition_vi: Triệu chứng thể chất xuất phát từ nguyên nhân tâm lý; bệnh lý cơ thể do căng thẳng hoặc rối loạn tâm lý gây ra
definition_en: Physical symptoms or bodily complaints that originate from or are exacerbated by psychological factors
example_sentence: Chronic stress can manifest as psychosomatic symptoms such as headaches, muscle tension, and gastrointestinal disturbances.

definition_vi: Quá trình phát triển khả năng phục hồi, sức chống chịu; xây dựng năng lực vượt qua khó khăn
definition_en: The process of developing psychological strength and capacity to recover from adversity
example_sentence: School-based resilience-building programs have demonstrated positive outcomes in reducing youth mental health problems.

definition_vi: Sai lệch trong cách suy nghĩ; những quan niệm sai lạc hoặc bóp méo thực tế dẫn đến cảm xúc tiêu cực
definition_en: Irrational or exaggerated thinking patterns that distort reality and contribute to negative emotions
example_sentence: Cognitive distortions such as catastrophizing and black-and-white thinking are common in individuals with anxiety disorders.

definition_vi: Kiến thức và hiểu biết về sức khỏe tâm thần; khả năng nhận biết, hiểu biết và ứng phó với các vấn đề tâm lý
definition_en: Knowledge and understanding of mental health conditions, their prevention, and available treatments and support
example_sentence: Improving mental health literacy among the general population is crucial for early identification and intervention.

definition_vi: Mối quan hệ tin tưởng và hợp tác giữa nhà trị liệu và bệnh nhân; sự liên kết tích cực trong quá trình điều trị
definition_en: The collaborative relationship and mutual trust between a therapist and client that facilitates healing and progress
example_sentence: A strong therapeutic alliance is one of the most significant predictors of positive outcomes in psychotherapy.

definition_vi: bằng chứng mạnh mẽ, thuyết phục; dữ liệu/sự kiện rõ ràng chứng minh điều gì
definition_en: clear and convincing proof or facts that support a claim
example_sentence: The researchers presented strong evidence that climate change is accelerating global warming significantly.

definition_vi: mối lo ngại lớn, vấn đề quan trọng cần chú ý; điều gây lo lắng chính
definition_en: a significant worry or important issue that needs attention
example_sentence: Environmental pollution remains a major concern for governments worldwide seeking sustainable solutions.

definition_vi: phát triển bền vững; tăng trưởng kinh tế vừa đáp ứng nhu cầu hiện tại vừa bảo vệ tài nguyên tương lai
definition_en: economic growth that meets present needs without harming future generations' resources
example_sentence: Many Asian countries are investing in renewable energy to achieve sustainable development goals.

definition_vi: cuộc cạnh tranh gay gắt, khốc liệt; sự tranh giành mạnh mẽ giữa các đối thủ
definition_en: intense and aggressive rivalry between competitors
example_sentence: The smartphone market faces fierce competition as companies constantly innovate to attract consumers.

definition_vi: vấn đề tới hạn, cấp bách; sự việc rất quan trọng và cần giải quyết ngay
definition_en: a serious and urgent problem that requires immediate attention
example_sentence: Water scarcity has become a critical issue in developing nations affecting millions of people.

definition_vi: tác động sâu sắc, ảnh hưởng lớn; sự thay đổi mạnh mẽ và có ý nghĩa
definition_en: a deep and significant effect or influence on something
example_sentence: The industrial revolution had a profound impact on society, transforming how people lived and worked.

definition_vi: sự chấp nhận rộng rãi; việc áp dụng/sử dụng phổ biến ở nhiều nơi
definition_en: broad acceptance and use of something across many places or groups
example_sentence: The widespread adoption of smartphones has revolutionized communication and business practices globally.

definition_vi: nguyên tắc cơ bản, nền tảng; quy tắc hoặc ý tưởng chính yếu nhất
definition_en: a basic rule or essential idea that forms the foundation of something
example_sentence: Democracy is built on the fundamental principle that all citizens have equal rights and voice.

definition_vi: thành tích đáng chú ý, nổi bật; kết quả ấn tượng đạt được
definition_en: a notable and impressive accomplishment or success
example_sentence: Landing humans on the moon was a remarkable achievement that demonstrated technological advancement.

definition_vi: rủi ro vốn có, nguy hiểm tự nhiên; mối nguy hiểm nằm sẵn trong bản chất của cái gì
definition_en: a danger or hazard that is naturally present or built-in
example_sentence: Medical procedures carry inherent risks that doctors must discuss with patients before treatment.

definition_vi: tình trạng thiếu hụt cấp bách, tức thời; sự khan hiếm nghiêm trọng
definition_en: a severe and immediate lack or scarcity of something needed
example_sentence: The pandemic created an acute shortage of medical supplies in hospitals worldwide.

definition_vi: tầm quan trọng chiến lược; giá trị then chốt trong kế hoạch dài hạn
definition_en: significant value or relevance in achieving long-term goals or plans
example_sentence: The location of the port has strategic importance for international trade and regional security.

definition_vi: vấn đề mãn tính, kéo dài; sự cố tồn tại lâu dài khó giải quyết
definition_en: a persistent and long-lasting difficulty that is hard to solve
example_sentence: Unemployment remains a chronic problem in many developing countries affecting economic stability.

definition_vi: giải pháp tối ưu, hoàn hảo nhất; cách giải quyết tốt nhất có thể
definition_en: the best possible answer or method to solve a problem
example_sentence: Engineers worked to find the optimal solution for reducing energy consumption in buildings.

definition_vi: lợi ích cụ thể, hữu hình; kết quả tích cực có thể nhận thấy rõ
definition_en: a real and concrete advantage that can be clearly observed or measured
example_sentence: The new training program provided tangible benefits by increasing employee productivity significantly.

definition_vi: tình huống bất ổn, dễ thay đổi; hoàn cảnh không ổn định và có thể xấu đi
definition_en: an unstable condition that can change suddenly and unpredictably
example_sentence: The political situation in the region remains volatile with ongoing tensions between neighboring countries.

definition_vi: phương pháp toàn diện, bao quát; cách tiếp cận xem xét tất cả các khía cạnh
definition_en: a thorough method that considers all aspects or elements of a problem
example_sentence: Addressing climate change requires a comprehensive approach involving government, business, and individuals.

definition_vi: sự khác biệt nhỏ, không đáng kể; chênh lệch rất ít
definition_en: a small or insignificant variation between two things
example_sentence: There was only a marginal difference in test scores between the two student groups.

definition_vi: yêu cầu nghiêm ngặt, khắt khe; tiêu chuẩn cao và bắt buộc phải tuân thủ
definition_en: a strict and demanding standard that must be met
example_sentence: International safety standards impose stringent requirements on pharmaceutical companies before product approval.

definition_vi: sự tăng trưởng chưa từng có, kỷ lục; sự phát triển vượt bất kỳ mức nào trước đây
definition_en: expansion or increase that has never happened before or exceeded all previous records
example_sentence: The tech industry experienced unprecedented growth during the digital transformation decade.

definition_vi: tiềm năng tiềm ẩn, chưa khai thác; khả năng tồn tại nhưng chưa được phát huy
definition_en: hidden or undeveloped capability that exists but has not yet been realized
example_sentence: Many developing nations possess latent potential for economic growth if they invest in education.

definition_vi: phát biểu mơ hồ, không rõ ràng; lời nói có thể hiểu theo nhiều cách khác nhau
definition_en: a declaration or claim that can be interpreted in multiple ways or is unclear
example_sentence: The politician's ambiguous statement left voters confused about his actual position on the issue.

definition_vi: lý do thuyết phục, lý do có sức thuyết phục mạnh mẽ
definition_en: a reason that is convincing and forces acceptance or agreement
example_sentence: The government provided compelling reasons for implementing the new environmental policy despite initial public resistance.

definition_vi: sự lựa chọn cố ý, quyết định được suy nghĩ kỹ lưỡng
definition_en: a conscious and intentional decision made after careful consideration
example_sentence: Her decision to pursue a career in medicine was a deliberate choice based on years of research and mentorship.

definition_vi: xu hướng rõ ràng, xu hướng dễ nhận thấy
definition_en: a clear and obvious pattern or direction of change
example_sentence: An evident trend in recent years shows increasing investment in renewable energy across developed nations.

definition_vi: thách thức khó khăn, vấn đề đáng gờm
definition_en: a difficult problem or obstacle that inspires fear or respect due to its difficulty
example_sentence: Climate change remains a formidable challenge that requires coordinated international efforts and innovative solutions.

definition_vi: sự thay đổi từ từ, sự chuyển dịch dần dần
definition_en: a slow and steady change from one state or position to another
example_sentence: There has been a gradual shift in consumer preferences toward organic and locally-sourced products over the past decade.

definition_vi: giá trị nội tại, giá trị vốn có
definition_en: worth or importance that is natural and essential to something, not dependent on external factors
example_sentence: Education has inherent value beyond its economic benefits, contributing to personal development and social cohesion.

definition_vi: mối quan tâm chính đáng, lo lắng có cơ sở
definition_en: a valid and reasonable worry or anxiety based on factual grounds
example_sentence: Parents have legitimate concerns about the safety of online learning platforms and data privacy for their children.

definition_vi: tài nguyên hạn chế, nguồn lực ít ỏi
definition_en: insufficient or inadequate supplies, funds, or materials available for a task
example_sentence: Developing countries often struggle with meager resources to invest in infrastructure and education systems.

definition_vi: ngoại lệ đáng chú ý, trường hợp ngoại lệ đặc biệt
definition_en: something that is different from the general pattern and worthy of attention or mention
example_sentence: While most European countries adopted the metric system, the United Kingdom remains a notable exception in many measurements.

definition_vi: nỗ lực kiên trì, cố gắng không ngừng
definition_en: continuous and determined attempt to achieve something despite difficulties
example_sentence: Through persistent effort and dedication, the research team successfully developed a breakthrough treatment for the disease.

definition_vi: giải thích hợp lý, lý giải có thể tin được
definition_en: an explanation that seems reasonable and believable, though not necessarily proven
example_sentence: Scientists offered a plausible explanation for the unusual weather patterns based on recent climate data.

definition_vi: cách tiếp cận thực tế, phương pháp dựa trên thực tiễn
definition_en: a practical and realistic method focused on actual results rather than theory
example_sentence: The company adopted a pragmatic approach to reduce costs by focusing on efficiency rather than cutting essential services.

definition_vi: thông tin liên quan, dữ liệu có liên quan
definition_en: data or facts that are directly connected to and important for a particular topic or situation
example_sentence: The court required all relevant information about the defendant's background before making a final judgment.

definition_vi: tiêu chuẩn nghiêm ngặt, yêu cầu chặt chẽ
definition_en: a strict and demanding criterion or requirement that must be met precisely
example_sentence: Medical schools maintain rigorous standards in their admissions process to ensure only qualified candidates are accepted.

definition_vi: sự khác biệt tinh tế, sự khác nhau không dễ nhận thấy
definition_en: a small and delicate distinction that is not immediately obvious but important to understand
example_sentence: There is a subtle difference between the meanings of 'imply' and 'infer' that many English learners find confusing.

definition_vi: giải pháp khả thi, cách giải quyết có thể thực hiện được
definition_en: a practical and workable answer to a problem that is capable of being implemented successfully
example_sentence: Renewable energy sources represent a viable solution to reduce dependence on fossil fuels and combat climate change.

definition_vi: mô tả sống động, hình ảnh chi tiết và sinh động
definition_en: a detailed and lively account that creates a clear and striking mental image
example_sentence: The author's vivid description of the ancient city brought the historical setting to life for readers.

definition_vi: môi trường lành mạnh, bối cảnh tốt cho sự phát triển
definition_en: a healthy and morally sound setting that promotes well-being and positive development
example_sentence: Schools strive to create a wholesome environment where students can learn and develop both academically and socially.

definition_vi: đức tin, niềm tin tôn giáo
definition_en: strong belief in God or in the doctrines of a religion
example_sentence: Many people find comfort in their faith during difficult times in life.

definition_vi: sùng kính, tôn kính, ngoan đạo
definition_en: deeply religious and sincere in one's beliefs
example_sentence: The devout Buddhist monk spent hours in meditation practicing his spiritual disciplines.

definition_vi: hội thánh, cộng đoàn tôn giáo
definition_en: a group of people assembled for religious worship
example_sentence: The congregation gathered in the church to celebrate the religious festival together.

definition_vi: học thuyết, giáo lý
definition_en: a set of principles or beliefs taught by a religion or organization
example_sentence: The doctrine of karma is fundamental to understanding Buddhist philosophy and practice.

definition_vi: tâm linh, về tinh thần
definition_en: relating to the human spirit or soul rather than physical matters
example_sentence: Meditation and prayer are important spiritual practices for many religious believers worldwide.

definition_vi: vị thần, thần thánh
definition_en: a god or goddess of a particular religion
example_sentence: Hinduism recognizes many deities, each representing different aspects of cosmic power.

definition_vi: chủ nghĩa vô thần, không tin tôn giáo
definition_en: the belief that God does not exist
example_sentence: Atheism has grown significantly in Western countries over the past few decades.

definition_vi: chuyến hành hương, du ngoạn tôn giáo
definition_en: a journey to a sacred place for religious reasons
example_sentence: Many Muslims undertake the pilgrimage to Mecca as one of the Five Pillars of Islam.

definition_vi: thánh thiêng, đáng kính, tôn kính
definition_en: connected with God or religion; treated with great respect
example_sentence: The temple is a sacred space where followers gather to worship and honor their deities.

definition_vi: sự báng bổ tôn giáo, lời lăng mạ thần thánh
definition_en: disrespectful talk about God or something sacred; irreverent speech
example_sentence: In many traditional societies, blasphemy against religious beliefs is considered a serious social offense.

definition_vi: phái, tông phái tôn giáo
definition_en: a group of people with differing religious beliefs from the main body of their faith
example_sentence: Various sects within Christianity have developed different interpretations of biblical teachings.

definition_vi: quy tụ, người quy tụ tôn giáo
definition_en: to change one's religious faith or beliefs; a person who has changed their religion
example_sentence: She decided to convert to Buddhism after studying its philosophy for several years.

definition_vi: nghi lễ, tôn giáo lễ nghi
definition_en: a religious or solemn ceremony consisting of a series of actions performed in a fixed order
example_sentence: The daily ritual of prayer is an essential spiritual practice in most world religions.

definition_vi: t异端, học thuyết dị đoan
definition_en: belief or opinion contrary to established religious doctrine
example_sentence: During the Medieval period, heresy against the Church was punished very severely indeed.

definition_vi: giáo sỹ, nhóm linh mục
definition_en: members of the Christian church who are ordained as priests or ministers
example_sentence: The clergy played an important role in shaping medieval European society and governance.

definition_vi: nhà tiên tri, tiên sinh
definition_en: a person believed to be a messenger of God and to speak the divine word
example_sentence: Prophet Muhammad is revered by Muslims as the final messenger of God in Islam.

definition_vi: phúc âm, tin mừng
definition_en: the teachings of Jesus and the apostles; the Christian message
example_sentence: The four Gospels in the New Testament provide accounts of Jesus's life and teachings.

definition_vi: giác ngộ, khai sáng tâm linh
definition_en: spiritual knowledge and understanding, especially liberation from ignorance in Buddhism
example_sentence: The Buddha achieved enlightenment through meditation and deep spiritual understanding.

definition_vi: trường linh mục, học viện tôn giáo
definition_en: an educational institution for training religious leaders and priests
example_sentence: Young men study for many years in seminaries to become ordained priests.

definition_vi: tử đạo, người tử vì tín ngưỡng
definition_en: a person who is killed because of their religious or political beliefs
example_sentence: Early Christian martyrs were honored for their willingness to die for their faith.

definition_vi: nơi thánh, thánh đường, khu tôn giáo
definition_en: a sacred place, especially the inner chamber of a religious building
example_sentence: The sanctuary of the ancient temple was where priests performed sacred religious ceremonies.

definition_vi: thuyết pháp, rao giảng
definition_en: to give a sermon or religious discourse to an audience
example_sentence: The minister preaches sermons every Sunday to the congregation in the church.

definition_vi: tội lỗi, tội tác
definition_en: an immoral act considered a transgression against divine law
example_sentence: In Christian theology, repentance allows believers to seek forgiveness for their sins.

definition_vi: cứu chuộc, giải thoát tâm linh
definition_en: the action of saving someone from sin, error, or evil; spiritual salvation
example_sentence: Christians believe in Jesus's redemption of humanity through his sacrifice and death.

definition_vi: dựa trên đức tin tôn giáo
definition_en: founded on or relying on religious belief rather than empirical evidence
example_sentence: Many faith-based organizations provide social services and charitable support to communities.

definition_vi: chuyển hướng đến, tìm cầu trong tôn giáo
definition_en: to begin to practice a religion; to seek help from a religious source
example_sentence: During the pandemic, many people turned to religion for hope and spiritual comfort.

definition_vi: sự rời bỏ tôn giáo, phản bội đạo
definition_en: the abandonment of one's religious faith or beliefs
example_sentence: In some theocratic countries, apostasy from the state religion is considered a serious crime.

definition_vi: liên tôn giáo, tìm kiếm sự hợp nhất các tôn giáo
definition_en: promoting unity among different Christian churches or religions
example_sentence: The ecumenical movement seeks to build dialogue and unity between different religious traditions.

definition_vi: phong thánh, công nhận là thánh nhân
definition_en: to officially declare someone to be a saint in the Roman Catholic Church
example_sentence: The Pope officially canonized Mother Teresa as a saint after recognizing her spiritual contributions.

definition_vi: chủ nghĩa禁欲, khổ hành
definition_en: the practice of renouncing physical pleasures and living a strict religious lifestyle
example_sentence: Buddhist monks practice asceticism by renouncing material possessions and desires entirely.

definition_vi: 신학, học về thần học
definition_en: the study of God and religious belief; the academic discipline of religious studies
example_sentence: Students studying theology engage deeply with philosophical questions about God and faith.

definition_vi: Một nguyên tắc hoặc tập hợp các nguyên tắc được công bố là tuyệt đối đúng, thường không cho phép bất kỳ sự nghi ngờ hay thảo luận nào; giáo điều cứng nhắc.
definition_en: A principle or set of principles laid down by an authority as incontrovertibly true, especially in religious contexts.
example_sentence: The church's rigid dogma prevented many followers from questioning traditional interpretations of scripture.

definition_vi: Tỏ lòng tôn kính sâu sắc hoặc sùng bái đối với ai/cái gì, đặc biệt là những người hoặc vật linh thiêng.
definition_en: To regard or treat with great respect and reverence, especially in a religious context.
example_sentence: Many pilgrims venerate the ancient relics housed within the cathedral's inner sanctum.

definition_vi: Một trong những người theo dõi trực tiếp của Chúa Giêsu; rộng hơn, một người ủng hộ nhiệt thành của một ý tưởng hoặc phong trào.
definition_en: One of the twelve chief disciples of Jesus Christ; more broadly, a vigorous and pioneering advocate of a particular cause.
example_sentence: The apostles spread Christianity throughout the Mediterranean region despite facing severe persecution.

definition_vi: Sự chia rẽ hoặc tách rời trong một tổ chức tôn giáo, đặc biệt là khi một nhóm từ chối tuân theo quyền lực trung ương.
definition_en: A division or split within a religious organization, typically resulting from doctrinal disagreement.
example_sentence: The Great Schism of 1054 permanently divided the Christian Church into Eastern Orthodox and Roman Catholic branches.

definition_vi: Cố gắng chuyên đổi ai đó sang một tôn giáo, quan điểm chính trị hoặc ý tưởng khác; thường mang sắc thái của sự thuyết phục mạnh mẽ.
definition_en: To convert or attempt to convert someone from one religion, belief, or opinion to another.
example_sentence: Missionaries were accused of proselytizing aggressively among indigenous populations during the colonial era.

definition_vi: Niềm tin vào khả năng đạt được sự hiểu biết hoặc liên hệ trực tiếp với thần thánh hoặc thực tại tuyệt đối thông qua trực giác hoặc trải nghiệm tâm linh.
definition_en: The belief that direct knowledge of God or ultimate reality is attainable through immediate intuition or insight rather than rational thought.
example_sentence: Sufi mysticism emphasizes personal spiritual experience and the pursuit of union with the divine.

definition_vi: Sự phá hủy hoặc phản đối các biểu tượng tôn giáo hoặc những gì được coi là thánh; rộng hơn, sự phản đối mạnh mẽ chống lại các quan niệm truyền thống.
definition_en: The destruction of religious images or opposition to their use; more broadly, vigorous opposition to established beliefs or institutions.
example_sentence: The Protestant Reformation included periods of iconoclasm when religious artwork was destroyed as idolatry.

definition_vi: Sự kết hợp hoặc hòa trộn các yếu tố từ các tôn giáo hoặc hệ thống niềm tin khác nhau; thường xảy ra khi các nền văn hóa gặp nhau.
definition_en: The amalgamation of different religious beliefs and practices, typically occurring when cultures come into contact.
example_sentence: Brazilian Candomblé represents a fascinating syncretism of African, Catholic, and indigenous spiritual traditions.

definition_vi: Liên quan đến Giáo hội hoặc tổ chức tôn giáo, đặc biệt là cấu trúc, quyền lực hoặc luật lệ của nó.
definition_en: Relating to the Christian Church or its clergy and organization.
example_sentence: Ecclesiastical law governed the conduct of priests and the administration of church properties throughout medieval Europe.

definition_vi: Quan điểm hoặc niềm tin không phù hợp với những gì được chính thức công nhận hoặc được chấp nhận; sự khác biệt so với giáo điều chính thống.
definition_en: Belief or opinion contrary to what is officially established or generally accepted, especially in religious matters.
example_sentence: Medieval scholars who embraced heterodoxy risked severe punishment from the ecclesiastical authorities.

definition_vi: lúc đầu, ban đầu; ở giai đoạn đầu tiên của một quá trình
definition_en: at the beginning; in the first place
synonyms: at first, originally, in the beginning
example_sentence: Initially, the government rejected the proposal, but later changed its position after public pressure.

definition_vi: sau đó, tiếp theo; xảy ra hoặc làm điều gì sau một sự kiện khác
definition_en: afterwards; at a later time
example_sentence: The company launched its first product in 2010, and subsequently expanded to five countries within three years.

definition_vi: cuối cùng, rốt cuộc; kết quả cuối cùng hoặc quyết định cuối cùng
definition_en: in the end; finally; as the final result
example_sentence: Although the project faced many obstacles, it ultimately succeeded because of the team's determination.

definition_vi: nhìn chung, tổng thể; xem xét tất cả các yếu tố hoặc khía cạnh
definition_en: considering everything; in general
synonyms: in general, on the whole, all in all
example_sentence: Overall, the conference was productive, though some sessions could have been better organized.

definition_vi: tóm lại, nói tóm gọn; kết luận lại những điểm chính
definition_en: to summarize the main points
synonyms: in summary, in short, to conclude
example_sentence: To sum up, climate change requires immediate action from both governments and individuals worldwide.

definition_vi: kết luận, để kết thúc; dùng để giới thiệu phần kết luận cuối cùng
definition_en: at the end; to introduce a final statement
synonyms: to sum up, in summary, finally
example_sentence: In conclusion, the research demonstrates that regular exercise significantly improves mental health.

definition_vi: do đó, vì vậy; chỉ ra hệ quả hoặc kết quả của điều gì đó
definition_en: therefore; because of this
example_sentence: The factory reduced its waste by 40%, and as a result, saved millions in disposal costs.

definition_vi: do đó, vì vậy; là hệ quả logic của điều gì đó
definition_en: as a result; therefore
example_sentence: The pandemic disrupted supply chains, and consequently, many businesses had to adapt their operations.

definition_vi: trong khi đó, cùng lúc đó; chỉ ra điều gì xảy ra cùng thời gian
definition_en: at the same time; while this is happening
synonyms: at the same time, in the meantime, simultaneously
example_sentence: The CEO was negotiating with investors; meanwhile, the technical team was developing the new software.

definition_vi: sau đó, từ đó trở đi; từ thời điểm đó về sau
definition_en: after that; from that time onwards
example_sentence: The treaty was signed in 1995, and thereafter, the two nations maintained peaceful relations.

definition_vi: trước hết, ngay từ đầu; dùng để nhấn mạnh điểm đầu tiên hoặc lý do ban đầu
definition_en: firstly; to begin with; as the primary reason
synonyms: initially, to begin with, first of all
example_sentence: In the first place, we should consider the budget constraints before approving any new projects.

definition_vi: thứ hai, tiếp theo; dùng để giới thiệu điểm thứ hai trong một danh sách
definition_en: secondly; as the second point
example_sentence: In the second place, we need to improve our customer service to maintain market competitiveness.

definition_vi: cuối cùng, rốt cuộc; ở điểm cuối cùng hoặc sau một loạt sự kiện
definition_en: at last; in the end; as the last point
synonyms: ultimately, at last, in the end
example_sentence: After months of negotiation, the two companies finally reached an agreement on the merger terms.

definition_vi: tóm lại, nói tóm gọn; dùng để tóm tắt các điểm chính
definition_en: to summarize; briefly stated
synonyms: to sum up, in short, in conclusion
example_sentence: In summary, the study found that sleep deprivation negatively affects academic performance in teenagers.

definition_vi: kết luận, để kết thúc; dùng để giới thiệu phần kết luận hoặc ý kiến cuối cùng
definition_en: to end; to make a final statement
synonyms: in conclusion, to sum up, finally
example_sentence: To conclude, renewable energy sources are essential for sustainable development in the 21st century.

definition_vi: vì vậy, do đó; chỉ ra kết quả logic của điều gì đó (trang trọng hơn 'so')
definition_en: therefore; in this way; as a result
example_sentence: The new policy reduced operational costs by 30%; thus, the company could invest more in research and development.

definition_vi: nói cách khác, hay là; dùng để diễn đạt lại ý tưởng bằng cách khác
definition_en: that is to say; to rephrase
example_sentence: The company's revenue increased by 25% last year; in other words, the business strategy proved highly effective.

definition_vi: nhìn chung, tổng thể; xem xét toàn bộ tình huống mà không chú ý chi tiết
definition_en: in general; considering everything
synonyms: overall, in general, all in all
example_sentence: On the whole, the conference was successful despite some minor technical issues with the presentation equipment.

definition_vi: tóm lại, nhìn chung; dùng để tóm tắt hoặc đánh giá toàn bộ tình huống
definition_en: considering everything; in total
synonyms: overall, on the whole, in summary
example_sentence: All in all, the project was completed on time and within budget, exceeding stakeholder expectations.

definition_vi: nói tóm gọn, tóm lại; dùng để tóm tắt một ý tưởng dài thành vài từ
definition_en: briefly; in summary
synonyms: in summary, to sum up, briefly
example_sentence: In short, climate change poses unprecedented challenges that require immediate global cooperation and action.

definition_vi: lúc đầu, ban đầu; ở giai đoạn sớm nhất của một quá trình
definition_en: in the beginning; initially
example_sentence: At first, the students found the new curriculum challenging, but they adapted quickly after a few weeks.

definition_vi: cuối cùng, rốt cuộc; sau một thời gian dài hoặc sau nhiều nỗ lực
definition_en: in the end; after a long time
example_sentence: The startup faced numerous setbacks, but eventually became one of the most successful companies in the tech industry.

definition_vi: cuối cùng, rốt cuộc; sau tất cả mọi thứ được xem xét
definition_en: finally; ultimately; after everything
example_sentence: In the end, the decision to invest in renewable energy proved to be both environmentally and economically beneficial.

definition_vi: từ đây trở đi, kể từ bây giờ về sau (dùng trong văn bản chính thức hoặc học thuật)
definition_en: from this point forward; from now on in a formal or official context
example_sentence: The new regulations will be enforced henceforth, and all employees must comply with the updated guidelines.

definition_vi: đi trước, phía trước (về thời gian hoặc vị trí)
definition_en: coming or occurring before something in time or order
example_sentence: The data presented in the preceding chapter demonstrates a clear correlation between climate change and biodiversity loss.

definition_vi: sau khi, tiếp theo sau (thường dùng trong văn bản chính thức)
definition_en: occurring or coming after something else in time
example_sentence: Subsequent to the initial investigation, the committee discovered additional evidence that contradicted the original findings.

definition_vi: nói chung, nhìn chung, phần lớn
definition_en: on the whole; in general; mostly
example_sentence: By and large, the survey results indicate that most teenagers prefer online learning to traditional classroom instruction.

definition_vi: xét đến, dựa trên, với sự xem xét đến
definition_en: considering; taking into account; because of
example_sentence: In light of the recent economic downturn, the government has decided to implement stricter fiscal policies.

definition_vi: mặc dù, bất chấp, không kể đến
definition_en: in spite of; despite; however
example_sentence: Notwithstanding the significant challenges faced by the organization, it managed to achieve its annual targets.

definition_vi: có lợi cho, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho, giúp thúc đẩy
definition_en: to help create conditions that make something possible or likely
example_sentence: A calm and organized workspace is conducive to productivity and creative thinking.

definition_vi: sau khi, trong thời gian sau (thường là sau một sự kiện quan trọng)
definition_en: as a consequence of; following after an event
synonyms: following, after, as a result of
example_sentence: In the wake of the pandemic, many companies accelerated their digital transformation strategies.

definition_vi: rút ra kết luận, đi đến kết luận
definition_en: to reach a decision or opinion based on evidence or reasoning
synonyms: reach a conclusion, come to a conclusion
example_sentence: Based on the experimental results, researchers were able to draw a conclusion about the effectiveness of the new treatment.

definition_vi: về bản chất, về cơ bản, nói một cách cơ bản
definition_en: fundamentally; basically; in the most important sense
example_sentence: In essence, the government's new policy aims to reduce carbon emissions by promoting renewable energy sources.

definition_vi: mâu thuẫn với, không phù hợp với, trái ngược với
definition_en: to be in disagreement or conflict with something
example_sentence: The company's environmental practices are at odds with its stated commitment to sustainability.

definition_vi: mở đường cho, tạo điều kiện cho, làm tiền đề cho
definition_en: to make it possible for something to happen; to prepare the ground for
example_sentence: The discovery of antibiotics paved the way for modern medicine and saved countless lives.

definition_vi: bắt nguồn từ, xuất phát từ, có gốc rễ từ
definition_en: to originate from; to have as a source or cause
synonyms: originate from, arise from, result from
example_sentence: Many social problems stem from poverty and lack of educational opportunities.

definition_vi: chứng minh, xác nhận, làm cho trở thành sự thật
definition_en: to confirm or support a claim, theory, or statement with evidence
example_sentence: Recent studies bear out the hypothesis that regular exercise significantly improves mental health.

definition_vi: cùng với, song song với, kết hợp với
definition_en: together with; at the same time as; in conjunction with
synonyms: alongside, together with, in conjunction with
example_sentence: The government implemented tax reforms in tandem with infrastructure development to boost economic growth.

definition_vi: nhấn mạnh, làm nổi bật, gạch chân (ý nghĩa)
definition_en: to emphasize or highlight the importance of something
example_sentence: The report underscores the urgent need for climate action and international cooperation.

definition_vi: gây ra hoặc làm nhanh chóng xảy ra (một sự kiện, tình huống); đẩy nhanh tiến trình
definition_en: to cause something to happen suddenly or sooner than expected
example_sentence: The economic crisis precipitated a series of political reforms across the nation.

definition_vi: vì vậy, do đó; từ đây, từ lúc này (chỉ thời gian); từ nơi này
definition_en: for this reason; therefore; from this place or time
example_sentence: The government implemented stricter environmental regulations; hence, carbon emissions decreased significantly.

definition_vi: có thể quy cho, có thể gán cho (nguyên nhân, lý do); được cho là do
definition_en: able to be ascribed or assigned to a particular cause or source
synonyms: due to, caused by, traceable to
example_sentence: The rise in teenage depression is largely attributable to increased social media usage and academic pressure.

definition_vi: kết thúc bằng, đạt đỉnh điểm ở; dẫn đến kết quả cuối cùng
definition_en: to reach a final or climactic point; to end in a particular way
synonyms: result in, lead to, end in
example_sentence: Years of research and development culminated in the launch of a revolutionary medical device.

definition_vi: phụ thuộc vào, tùy thuộc vào (điều kiện); có điều kiện là
definition_en: dependent on; conditional upon; subject to
synonyms: dependent on, conditional on, subject to
example_sentence: The success of the project is contingent upon securing adequate funding and skilled personnel.

definition_vi: xảy ra sau đó, diễn ra tiếp theo; kế tiếp
definition_en: to happen or occur afterward; to follow as a consequence
example_sentence: The announcement of the merger sparked investor interest, and a sharp rise in stock prices ensued.

definition_vi: dựa trên, có cơ sở là; được xây dựng trên nền tảng
definition_en: based on; founded on; dependent on as a basis
synonyms: based on, founded on, grounded in
example_sentence: Modern educational reform is predicated on the belief that every student deserves equal opportunities.

definition_vi: bằng cách đó, nhờ vậy, do đó; qua đó
definition_en: by that means; as a result of that; in that way
example_sentence: The company invested heavily in automation, thereby reducing production costs and increasing efficiency.

definition_vi: chứng minh, xác nhận (bằng bằng chứng); làm cho có thực chất
definition_en: to provide evidence or proof for; to support with facts
example_sentence: The researcher's hypothesis was substantiated by extensive experimental data collected over five years.

set_name: Động Từ Đi Với Giới Từ
definition_vi: phụ thuộc vào, dựa vào; có liên quan đến điều gì
definition_en: to rely on someone or something; to be determined by
example_sentence: The success of the project depends on careful planning and teamwork from all members.

set_name: Động Từ Đi Với Giới Từ
definition_vi: đề cập đến, nhắc đến; tìm kiếm thông tin từ (tài liệu, người)
definition_en: to mention or allude to something; to consult a source for information
example_sentence: The author refers to historical events to support her argument about social change.

set_name: Động Từ Đi Với Giới Từ
definition_vi: góp phần vào, đóng góp cho; làm cho điều gì xảy ra
definition_en: to give or add something to a cause; to help cause something to happen
example_sentence: Regular exercise contributes to better physical health and mental well-being.

set_name: Động Từ Đi Với Giới Từ
definition_vi: chịu đựng, bị ảnh hưởng bởi (bệnh tật, khó khăn); trải qua điều xấu
definition_en: to experience pain, illness, or difficulty; to be affected negatively by
example_sentence: Many developing countries suffer from inadequate access to clean water and healthcare.

set_name: Động Từ Đi Với Giới Từ
definition_vi: phản đối, không đồng ý với; có ý kiến trái chiều
definition_en: to express disagreement or disapproval of something
example_sentence: Several environmental groups object to the construction of the new highway.

set_name: Động Từ Đi Với Giới Từ
definition_vi: tập trung vào, chú ý đến; làm trọng tâm
definition_en: to concentrate attention or effort on something specific
example_sentence: The research focuses on understanding how climate change affects marine ecosystems.

set_name: Động Từ Đi Với Giới Từ
definition_vi: dẫn đến, gây ra; có kết quả là
definition_en: to cause something to happen as a consequence
example_sentence: The policy changes resulted in significant improvements in student performance.

set_name: Động Từ Đi Với Giới Từ
definition_vi: chiếm, đạt tới (một tỷ lệ); giải thích, làm rõ
definition_en: to represent a proportion of something; to explain or provide reasons for
example_sentence: Renewable energy sources now account for nearly 30% of the country's total electricity.

set_name: Động Từ Đi Với Giới Từ
definition_vi: xử lý, giải quyết; có liên quan đến
definition_en: to handle or manage a problem; to be concerned with a topic
example_sentence: The government must deal with rising unemployment through education and job training programs.

set_name: Động Từ Đi Với Giới Từ
definition_vi: bao gồm, được cấu thành từ; gồm có
definition_en: to be made up of or composed of
example_sentence: The committee consists of five experts from different academic disciplines.

set_name: Động Từ Đi Với Giới Từ
definition_vi: được lợi từ, hưởng lợi từ; có lợi ích từ
definition_en: to gain advantage or profit from something
example_sentence: Students benefit from interactive learning methods that encourage critical thinking.

set_name: Động Từ Đi Với Giới Từ
definition_vi: áp dụng cho, có liên quan đến; nộp đơn xin vào
definition_en: to be relevant or suitable for; to submit a formal request
example_sentence: These safety regulations apply to all employees regardless of their position.

set_name: Động Từ Đi Với Giới Từ
definition_vi: dẫn đến, gây ra; có kết quả là
